creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Did you try drm-kmod instead of patching? In-base drm2 (aka drm-legacy-kmod) is deprecated (removed since FreeBSD 13.0) and not officially supported by upstream Mesa e.g., DRI3[1], Wayland. However, drm-kmod is best supported on FreeBSD >= 13.0, especially if you have an old GPU like 0x2a02 (GMA X3100 aka Crestline, released in 2007, Intel Gen4).

[1] See 20200308 entry in /usr/ports/UPDATING
